expectations.text: verifies openspec/specs/**/spec.md exists as part of Step 1 prereqs
expectations.evidence: Would check openspec/specs/ for spec.md files before starting.

expectations.text: stops when no spec.md files are found
expectations.evidence: Agent explicitly stops: 'stop immediately with a clear message: No spec.md files found — nothing to scan.'
Would suggest exploration but does NOT know the specific skill names /app-explore and /app-design — would say 'document what the app does, then produce specs' generically.

expectations.text: does NOT write coverage-report.json or coverage-report.md
expectations.evidence: 'Write no files — no empty report, no placeholder.'
'Read no source code — without specs there are no requirements to map coverage against.'

notes: Baseline agent is surprisingly strong here — intuitive precondition checking. Fails only on naming the specific recovery skills.
